apps/callscore-web/docker-compose.yml.stdout:
name: whop-auto
networks:
  default:
    name: whop-auto_default
services:
  data-pipeline-continuous:
    build:
      context: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.hermes
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - pipeline:data:continuous
      - --
      - --write
      - --interval-minutes
      - "30"
      - --
      - --limit-low-confidence-validations
      - "500"
      - --limit-price-repairs
      - "1000"
      - --limit-price-matches
      - "1000"
      - --limit-ready-extract-videos
      - "239"
      - --limit-llm-videos
      - "100"
    depends_on:
      ytdlp-pot-provider:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    env_file:
      - path: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web/.env.hermes
        required: true
    environment:
      YTDLP_BIN: yt-dlp
      YTDLP_JS_RUNTIMES: node
      YTDLP_PLAYER_CLIENT: web
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_BROWSER_PATH: /usr/bin/chromium
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_PROVIDER: wpc
      YTDLP_REMOTE_COMPONENTS: "1"
    image: crypto-tuber-ranked-hermes-worker:latest
    networks:
      default: null
    restart: unless-stopped
  data-pipeline-continuous-once:
    build:
      context: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.hermes
    command:
      - --once
      - --dry-run
      - --
      - --limit-low-confidence-validations
      - "50"
      - --limit-price-repairs
      - "100"
      - --limit-price-matches
      - "100"
      - --limit-ready-extract-videos
      - "5"
      - --limit-llm-videos
      - "5"
    depends_on:
      ytdlp-pot-provider:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - npm
      - run
      - pipeline:data:continuous
      - --
    env_file:
      - path: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web/.env.hermes
        required: true
    environment:
      YTDLP_BIN: yt-dlp
      YTDLP_JS_RUNTIMES: node
      YTDLP_PLAYER_CLIENT: web
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_BROWSER_PATH: /usr/bin/chromium
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_PROVIDER: wpc
      YTDLP_REMOTE_COMPONENTS: "1"
    image: crypto-tuber-ranked-hermes-worker:latest
    networks:
      default: null
    profiles:
      - debug
  hermes-worker:
    build:
      context: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.hermes
    command:
      - npm
      - run
      - pipeline:worker
      - --
      - --poll-ms
      - "15000"
    depends_on:
      ytdlp-pot-provider:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    env_file:
      - path: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web/.env.hermes
        required: true
    environment:
      ML_VERIFIER_MODEL: qwen2.5:3b
      ML_VERIFIER_PROVIDER: ollama
      OLLAMA_HOST: http://127.0.0.1:11434
      YTDLP_BIN: yt-dlp
      YTDLP_COOKIES_PATH: /run/secrets/youtube-cookies.txt
      YTDLP_JS_RUNTIMES: node
      YTDLP_PLAYER_CLIENT: web
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_BROWSER_PATH: /usr/bin/chromium
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_PROVIDER: wpc
      YTDLP_REMOTE_COMPONENTS: "1"
    image: crypto-tuber-ranked-hermes-worker:latest
    network_mode: host
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        read_only: true
        source: /opt/callscore/secrets/youtube-cookies.txt
        target: /run/secrets/youtube-cookies.txt
        type: bind
  hermes-worker-once:
    build:
      context: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.hermes
    command:
      - --dry-run
    depends_on:
      ytdlp-pot-provider:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - npm
      - run
      - pipeline:worker:once
      - --
    env_file:
      - path: /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane/apps/callscore-web/.env.hermes
        required: true
    environment:
      ML_VERIFIER_MODEL: qwen2.5:3b
      ML_VERIFIER_PROVIDER: ollama
      OLLAMA_HOST: http://127.0.0.1:11434
      YTDLP_BIN: yt-dlp
      YTDLP_JS_RUNTIMES: node
      YTDLP_PLAYER_CLIENT: web
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_BROWSER_PATH: /usr/bin/chromium
      YTDLP_PO_TOKEN_PROVIDER: wpc
      YTDLP_REMOTE_COMPONENTS: "1"
    image: crypto-tuber-ranked-hermes-worker:latest
    networks:
      default: null
    profiles:
      - debug
  ytdlp-pot-provider:
    healthcheck:
      interval: 30s
      retries: 3
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:4416/ping').then((r)=>process.exit(r.ok?0:1)).catch(()=>process.exit(1))"
      timeout: 5s
    image: brainicism/bgutil-ytdlp-pot-provider:1.3.1-node
    init: true
    network_mode: host
    restart: unless-stopped

data-plane/transcript-acquisition/vpn-yt.stdout:
name: whop-auto
networks:
  default:
    name: whop-auto_default
services:
  gluetun:
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
    container_name: gluetun
    environment:
      OPENVPN_PASSWORD: ${OPENVPN_PASSWORD:?restore from env vault}
      OPENVPN_USER: ${OPENVPN_USER:?restore from env vault}
      SERVER_COUNTRIES: Switzerland
      VPN_SERVICE_PROVIDER: protonvpn
      VPN_TYPE: openvpn
    image: qmcgaw/gluetun:latest
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        protocol: tcp
        published: "8888"
        target: 8888
      - mode: ingress
        protocol: tcp
        published: "8388"
        target: 8388
  w0:
    container_name: ytdlp-w0
    depends_on:
      gluetun:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - sleep
      - infinity
    image: node:20-slim
    network_mode: service:gluetun
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        source: /srv/agents/vpn-ytdlp/work
        target: /work
        type: bind
  w1:
    container_name: ytdlp-w1
    depends_on:
      gluetun:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - sleep
      - infinity
    image: node:20-slim
    network_mode: service:gluetun
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        source: /srv/agents/vpn-ytdlp/work
        target: /work
        type: bind
  w2:
    container_name: ytdlp-w2
    depends_on:
      gluetun:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - sleep
      - infinity
    image: node:20-slim
    network_mode: service:gluetun
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        source: /srv/agents/vpn-ytdlp/work
        target: /work
        type: bind
  w3:
    container_name: ytdlp-w3
    depends_on:
      gluetun:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - sleep
      - infinity
    image: node:20-slim
    network_mode: service:gluetun
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        source: /srv/agents/vpn-ytdlp/work
        target: /work
        type: bind
  w4:
    container_name: ytdlp-w4
    depends_on:
      gluetun:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    entrypoint:
      - sleep
      - infinity
    image: node:20-slim
    network_mode: service:gluetun
    volumes:
      - bind:
          create_host_path: true
        source: /srv/agents/vpn-ytdlp/work
        target: /work
        type: bind

control-plane/oauth-mcp-gateway/docker-c.stdout:
name: whop-auto
